scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "pnpm run dev:server" "pnpm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:client: dotenv -e .env -v PORT=5173 -v BASE_PATH=/ -- pnpm --filter @workspace/admin-dashboard run dev
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter @workspace/admin-dashboard --filter @workspace/api-server --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox --filter @workspace/scripts --if-present run typecheck
